content: Phase 5 Cycle 2 (§5.3 per-report analysis tier) implemented — commit 1cf1acc. (1) bug_reports.analysis_mode (auto|local_only|hold, default auto, migrated): hold blocks all LLM-stage auto-dispatch (Stage 1 validation/dedupe still runs per the mode's definition), local_only excluded from reports_eligible_for_fix; gating lives in the db.py eligibility queries so manual dispatch naturally bypasses it. Settable at creation + PATCH /reports/{id}/analysis_mode. (2) POST /reports/{id}/analyze {tier: local|cloud}: 202 + background dispatch; requires status=triaged (409 otherwise); cloud tier 409s without a completed SHA-fresh localization (mirrors reports_eligible_for_fix; propose_fix still re-checks after claim); explicit request overrides hold/local_only for that one run. (3) Provider split per approved plan: resolve_local_llm (project llm_provider/llm_model -> global triage/localize defaults) wired into Stages 2-3; new nullable projects.fix_llm_provider/fix_llm_model resolved per-field by resolve_fix_llm -> global fix_provider/default_fix_model; Stage 4 never reads llm_* (acceptance tests assert default-ollama project resolves fix to anthropic/claude-sonnet-4-6 and that a fix_llm_* override reaches the LLM call). Project PATCH accepts explicit null to clear fix_llm_* (other fields reject null). Note logged in plan §5.3: the 'per-report override' slot in the precedence chain has no carrier field in this slice (none was specced); stage functions keep model=/provider= params as the hook. Files: db.py, models.py, llm/client.py, pipeline/{triage,localizer,orchestrator,fix_proposer}.py, api/{reports,projects}.py, tests (31 new: test_analysis_mode.py + fix_proposer/api additions), docs (plan §5.3 checked, architecture.md LLM-tiering updated, CLAUDE.md de-staled, .env.example note). Full suite: 185 passed.

Approved. Reviewed Cycle 2 (§5.3) implementation for analysis_mode gating, manual analyze endpoint, and provider/model resolution isolation. Verified Stage 4 uses project fix_llm_* or global fix_provider/default_fix_model and does not read project llm_*; auto-dispatch gates block hold/local_only as specified while manual local/cloud requests override mode for one run. Focused tests passed: uv run pytest tests/test_analysis_mode.py tests/test_fix_proposer.py tests/test_api.py -q (89 passed). Full suite passed: uv run pytest -q (185 passed).
